code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    else
      is_ws = true
    end

    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            count = count + 1
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
